content.full_text:
Representing All Oxnard Citizens

DOROTHY MARON
DOROTHY S. MARON RE-ELECTION COMMITTEE
#841413
507 Glenwood Drive, P.O. Box 5306, Oxnard, CA 93031

3-12-90

FPPC

Request for clarification:

1.- If I wish to run for Mayor at mid-term in Nov. 1990 do I have to
form a separate committee? Can I transfer funds? How do I handle
contributions, some of which may be backing for Mayor and some as
support for reelection in 1992? Recognizing that the donors do
not specify!

2.- If I am the object of a recall, as City Councilwoman, can I run
for Mayor at the same time (Nov. 1990)? It is a different office
and race..

3.- As the object of a recall can I use funds in my present committee?
Thus can I raise and spend defense money under my present ID?

Thank you for any help you can offer on the above.

VTY

E. P. Merton
for D.S.Maron

Paid for by Dorothy S. Maron Re-Election Committee

YOUR VOICE ON CITY COUNCIL

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from Dorothy S. Maron, representing her re-election committee, and it is addressed to the FPPC (Fair Political Practices Commission). The request for clarification pertains to several legal and procedural questions related to running for office in Oxnard: 1. If I wish to run for Mayor at mid-term in Nov. 1990 do I have to form a separate committee? Can I transfer funds? How do I handle contributions, some of which may be backing for Mayor and some as support for reelection in 1992? Recognizing that the donors do not specify! 2. If I am the object of a recall, as City Councilwoman, can I run for Mayor at the same time (Nov. 1990)? It is a different office and race.. 3. As the object of a recall can I use funds in my present committee? Thus can I raise and spend defense money under my present ID? Thank you for any help you can offer on the above. VTY E. P. Marton for D.S. Maron
